libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep or add JVM/native-image test arguments equivalent to `--add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED` when tests exercise shaded Jackson `ClassUtil` enum/collection introspection such as `EnumSet` or `EnumMap`. Use the relocated `shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.*` APIs; the artifact embeds Jackson classes rather than requiring separate Jackson dependencies.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is an assertion mismatch in shaded Jackson annotation behavior, not evidence of a missing dependency or Docker service.
Tests that assert Jackson internals may be version-sensitive across the Jackson version shaded into parquet-jackson 1.16.0.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: parquet-jackson is a shaded Jackson-only artifact with no runtime Maven dependencies or external services, but meaningful coverage of its shaded Jackson internals can require opening java.util on modern JDKs.
